title: Guided First Run
prompt: Can Mahilo prove setup, orchestration, and trust in one OpenClaw run?
summary: Start from setup, confirm live connectivity, check that the first accepted contacts are ready, ask the network once, watch an attributed reply land in-thread, then hit a review gate on a sensitive follow-up and approve it narrowly.
trustSignals: The only explicit sender reuse is the setup-selected sender on the ask-around step; the later preview and approval steps omit it.
The replay includes the circle-ready checkpoint after the invite/setup loop, with accepted contacts already live before the first ask-around.
The ask-around reply lands back in the same OpenClaw thread as a Mahilo system update with attribution.
The precise location follow-up stops on review first and only becomes allow after a one-hour exception scoped to Alice.

resolveDraftResponses.agent_guidance: Ask for approval or adjust boundaries.

resolveDraftResponses.resolution_summary: Temporary location boundary lets this share go through.

steps.label: Attach identity and select the default sender
steps.name: mahilo setup

steps.label: Check that your first accepted contacts are ready before the first ask
steps.name: mahilo network
steps.note: The real empty-network loop is send_request -> accept -> mahilo setup on the other side. This replay starts after that checkpoint so you can rehearse the first working reply.

steps.label: Ask the network for one recommendation using the sender selected by setup
steps.name: mahilo_network
steps.note: This is the canonical orchestration moment: one ask fans out and waits for a live reply in the same thread.

input.question: Who knows a good ramen spot near the Mission for tonight?

steps.label: Alice replies back into the same OpenClaw thread
Preview a precise location follow-up before sending
steps.name: mahilo_message
steps.note: The first preview should stop on review instead of silently sending the location.

input.message: I'm at 18th and Valencia right now; meet me here at 7.

steps.label: Approve only this share for one hour
steps.name: mahilo_boundaries

steps.label: Retry the same preview after the explicit approval
steps.name: mahilo_message

input.message: I'm at 18th and Valencia right now; meet me here at 7.
